feature: P1-2 FP-Reduktion für COD, AVS, EDS (ADR-030)

COD.fix: Added min_isolation_ratio=0.50 gate — skip modules where <50% of units are isolated

AVS.fix_blast_radius: Raised absolute threshold 5→15, added pct>75% gate
AVS.fix_god_module: Raised thresholds: Ca 2→5, Ce 2→3, br 3→5, total max(6,mean*2)→max(10,mean*2.5)
AVS.fix_zone_of_pain: Raised Ca minimum 3→8, high_risk_evidence Ca≥6→Ca≥12 or (Ca≥10 and Ce≥2)

EDS.note: All 55 drift EDS findings have CC≥10 and LOC≥18 — threshold change only affects other repos with simpler functions

eds_finding_distribution.note: All EDS findings are on genuinely complex functions — no low-severity FPs present
